---
title: 'Chicken Express!'
date: '2010-06-01T12:43:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6289193973572873562'
blogger_filename: '/2010/06/chicken-express.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

Wells Fargo: May 31st Memorial Day<br />
<br />
WF fed us Chicken. Because I worked a 10 hour shift I was offered an extra plate! Yummy!
